svg.text: Lower is better; comparisons use upper estimates

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: lookup_subjects is 15.8% faster than P14 and 37.1% faster than P12.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: inherited and mixed real-world reads are within 1.7% of P14 and >22% faster than P12.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: lookup_resources_streaming is within 0.7% of P14 and 25.6% faster than P12.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

svg.text: prepared check is within 2.4% of P14 and 26.5% faster than P12.

svg.text: full load is 1.6% faster than P14; compact zstd size holds the P14 result.

text.font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
